MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
Jay T. Jambeck, Esq. of THE SCHINNER LAW GROUP 369-9053 moving to withdraw as attorney of record for defendant GEOTOUCH.COM, INC.
There being no appearance in opposition to this motion, counsel's motion to withdraw was granted by the Court. Order signed in open court. Counsel directed to proceed to Department 212 to inform the Trial Delay Reduction Department of this withdrawal. (301/JLW) Christina T. Paxton, CSR 1558
